note: Region anchors for fields that have no nearby text label to anchor against (DATE in the header box, WC officer-excluded Y/N box, DESCRIPTION OF OPERATIONS free-form area, Authorized Representative signature rect). Hand-authored because pdfjs.getTextContent() returns text items only — drawn rectangles in the content stream aren't enumerable through that API. If ACORD revises the template and these boxes move, update this file by hand AFTER regenerating template-anchors.json. The values were derived from the current absolute coordinates in lib/coords.ts that we know render correctly; the resolver computes field.x = region.x + dx, field.y = region.y + dy.

regions.name: DATE_BOX
regions.comment: Top-right header box. Holds today's date (MM/DD/YYYY).

regions.name: WC_OFFICER_BOX
regions.comment: Y/N box for officer-excluded indicator on the WORKERS COMPENSATION row.

regions.name: DESC_BOX
regions.comment: DESCRIPTION OF OPERATIONS free-form area below the coverages table.

regions.name: SIG_BOX
regions.comment: Authorized Representative signature rectangle, bottom-right of the cert.
